'''Mezza''' was the leader of one of two clans of [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] refugees stranded on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. She was an aging [[Gender/Legends|female]] with [[Color/Legends|graying]], red-orange [[Hair/Legends|fur]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
